response: This sprint retrospective notes that the sprint was successful thanks to the on-time shipping of the auth redesign and strong cross-team collaboration with design, while also flagging two areas for improvement: excessive context switches from managing three different projects and standups that run 25 minutes, missing the 15-minute target. The outlined action items to address these gaps are limiting each developer’s work in progress to two items and implementing timeboxed standups paired with a parking lot for off-topic conversation.
